$comment: Per-page extraction schema. STRUCTURAL + CONTENT fields (title, meta, h1, heading_counts, heading_outline, pseudo_headings, sections[].text, internal_links, external_links, images, tables_count, schema_types, word_count_total) are produced ACCURATELY by scripts/extract_page.py from the raw HTML. SEMANTIC fields (faqs Q&A, examples, features_or_riders, numbers, author/reviewer/dates, readability_note) are layered by the page-extractor agent via WebFetch. Keep names stable — build_report.py + gap-analyst depend on them.

pseudo_headings.$comment:
non-heading element (

/

/) styled like a heading — a topic the page presents as a section title but ships WITHOUT an H-tag; produced by extract_page.py
